# Temporary CLI Session Exhibit Index

## Scope

This index maps the current draft complaint in `workspace/improved-complaint-from-temporary-session.md` to workspace-local exhibits and migrated policy materials. It is intended to tighten the pleading against the evidence currently available in the workspace and to separate direct documentary support from policy support and open factual gaps.

## Workspace-Local Candidate Exhibits

| Exhibit ID | Workspace File | Current Use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| EX-01 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC 90 day notice.pdf` | December 23, 2025 90-day lease termination notice without cause |
| EX-02 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC 90 day notice 2.pdf` | Additional December 23, 2025 termination notice variant |
| EX-03 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC 90 day notice 3.pdf` | December 31, 2025 notice of eligibility and 90-day displacement notice |
| EX-04 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC first amendment.pdf` | February 4, 2026 30-day for-cause lease termination notice |
| EX-05 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC Jan 2026 blossom.pdf` | January 2026 Blossom-related action-required notice |
| EX-06 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/blossom.pdf` | Blossom marketing or application process summary showing HACC PBV waitlist processing |
| EX-07 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/Vera Application.pdf` | Comparable application workflow evidence for document-processing expectations |
| EX-08 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/housing authority project based voucher.pdf` | PBV program process and housing-placement context |
| EX-09 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC add to lease.pdf` | Lease amendment or add-remove tenant form |
| EX-10 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC vawa violation.pdf` | Lease amendment or occupancy record relevant to VAWA or household-change allegations |
| EX-11 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC financial requests.pdf` | February 9, 2026 request for additional information |
| EX-12 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/HACC steering.pdf` | February 26, 2026 letter relevant to housing placement or steering allegations |
| EX-13 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/Reasonable accomidation.pdf` | March 24, 2026 provider letter and HACC verification form supporting disability status, service-animal-related need, and a two-bedroom first-floor accommodation request tied to stair limits, caregiver privacy, and ADL/IADL assistance |
| EX-14 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/paper-exhibits/Housing Authority Clackamas County Brochure.pdf` | Relocation-road-map and voucher-use expectations |
| EX-15 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/prior-research-results/emergency_motion_packet/exhibits/Exhibit J - starworks5-additional-info-import/0012-Re-Additional-Information-Needed-CAMTdTS_FhDVzVctv75ZTfNndnL9QiuZyzEkD9bZ8-OKR7mZk6g-mail.gmail.com/message.json` | February 26, 2026 complaint email with civil-rights, Blossom non-processing, service-animal, race-discrimination, and documentation-escalation allegations |
| EX-16 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/prior-research-results/emergency_motion_packet/exhibits/Exhibit M - starworks5-ktilton-orientation-import/0007-RE-HCV-Orientation-f9ca224dab4a4487bb20b9f7ff33afbe-clackamas.us/message.json` | March 19, 2026 HACC email stating a two-bedroom voucher was created and sent in error and a one-bedroom voucher would issue |
| EX-17 | `temporary-cli-session-migration/prior-research-results/emergency_motion_packet/exhibits/Exhibit M - starworks5-ktilton-orientation-import/0009-RE-HCV-Orientation-0cb1a9bce9ce436ba29b873de4aef556-clackamas.us/message.json` | March 20, 2026 HACC email stating the voucher could be reissued as a two-bedroom if reasonable accommodation were approved |
